title: My Baby Lydia Soft Baby Doll with Bunny Outfit, Pink/Purple and White Striped, 2 Assorted - A to Z Collection
features: DESIGN FEATURES: Adorable soft baby doll wearing white overalls with cute bunny face design and matching striped top, complete with coordinating hat
OUTFIT DETAILS: Charming striped pattern on long-sleeve top and hat, white overalls with bunny motif and decorative bow accent
COLLECTION: Part of the A to Z collection, perfect for young children's imaginative play and nurturing skills development
STYLING: Available in two colour variations - pink/white stripes or purple/white stripes with matching accessories
PACKAGING: Comes in an attractive display box with clear window, making it an ideal gift presentation
description: Product Description Introducing the My Baby Lydia soft baby doll, a delightful addition to the A to Z Collection. This charming doll comes dressed in an adorable white overalls outfit featuring a sweet bunny face design with whiskers and ears. The outfit is complemented by a coordinating striped long-sleeve top, available in either pink or purple stripes, and a matching striped cap. The doll's soft construction makes it perfect for cuddling and imaginative play. The outfit includes cute details like a small decorative bow on the bunny design, adding an extra touch of charm. The doll's size and lightweight nature make it ideal for little hands to carry and care for. Perfect for nurturing play and developing caring skills, this doll makes a wonderful companion for young children. The simple yet endearing design encourages imaginative play while the quality construction ensures durability for long-lasting enjoyment. Suitable for children who enjoy role-playing and doll play activities. Safety Warning Warning: Not Suitable for children under 36 months - Choking Hazard - Small Parts
